REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF REBECCA DWYER NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES BY DEFENDANTS WILTON MARSHALL, AN INDIVIDUAL, AND WILTON MARSHALL, TRUSTEE OF THE MARSHALL FAMILY TRUST 2003 TO PLAINTIFFS REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE; AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANTS AND THEIR ATTORNEY IS GRANTED AS TO REQUESTS #1, 4 -38, 40-48, 51-68, 81, 83-84, AND 89-96 AS DEFENDANTS' RESPONSE STATING "DEFENDANT WILL PRODUCE ANY AND ALL RESPONSIVE NON-PRIVILEGED DOCUMENTS" IS NOT A COMPLETE RESPONSE AS IT IMPLIES THAT THERE ARE DOCUMENTS BEING WITHHELD WHICH REQUIRES A PRIVILEGE LOG PURSUANT TO CCP 2031.240. GRANTED AS TO REQUESTS #2, 3, 39, 70-72, 74-76, 78, 80, AND 82 AS THE RESPONSE IS NOT IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 2031.230. GRANTED AS TO AS TO REQUESTS 49-50. OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED. DEFENDANTS' RESPONSE STATING "DEFENDANT WILL PRODUCE ANY AND ALL RESPONSIVE NON-PRIVILEGED DOCUMENTS" IS NOT A COMPLETE RESPONSE AS IT IMPLIES THAT THERE ARE DOCUMENTS BEING WITHHELD WHICH REQUIRES A PRIVILEGE LOG PURSUANT TO CCP 2031.240. DENIED AS TO 69, 73, 77 AND 79. DEFENDANT TO SERVE VERIFIED RESPONSES IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 2031.210-240 TO REQUESTS # #1-49, 51-68, 70-72, 74-76, 78, AND 80-96 AND TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS TO THESE REQUESTS IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 2031.280 WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED AGAINST MARTIN GLICKFIELD ATTORNEY OF RECORD, SEVERELY, IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,880.00. PAYMENT TO BE MADE TO THE CLIENT TRUST FUND OF THE LAW OFFICES OF THOMAS W. J. PURTELL WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses By Defendants Wilton Marshall, An Individual, And Wilton Marshall, Trustee Of The Marshall Family Trust 2003 To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One; And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants And Their Attorney
Off Calendar Jan-26-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: (Court Call)
Martin Glickfeld, 415.441.7479 for Defendant Wilton Marshall.
Thomas Purtell, 414.722.6291 for Plaintiff Rebecca Dwyer.

Argued. Mr. Glickfeld states that he has complied with the request for responses and documents were provided to Plaintiff and that there is not previlge log. Mr. Glickfeld requests that if the Court grants the sanctions, that the sanctions are issued against him only and not his client.

The Court rules as follows: PLAINTIFF REBECCA DWYER Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses By Defendants Wilton Marshall, An Individual, And Wilton Marshall, Trustee Of The Marshall Family Trust 2003 To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One; And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants And Their Attorney is Granted as to Requests #1, 4 -38, 40-48, 51-68, 81, 83-84, and 89-96 as Defendants' response stating "Defendant will produce any and all responsive non-privileged documents" is not a complete response as it implies that there are documents being withheld which requires a privilege log pursuant to CCP 2031.240. Granted as to Requests #2, 3, 39, 70-72, 74-76, 78, 80, and 82 as the response is not in compliance with CCP 2031.230. Granted as to as to Requests 49-50. Objections are overruled. Defendants' response stating "Defendant will produce any and all responsive non-privileged documents" is not a complete response as it implies that there are documents being withheld which requires a privilege log pursuant to CCP 2031.240. Denied as to 69, 73, 77 and 79. Defendant to serve verified responses in compliance with CCP 2031.210-240 to Requests # #1-49, 51-68, 70-72, 74-76, 78, and 80-96 and to produce documents to these requests in compliance with CCP 2031.280 within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is granted against Martin Glickfield attorney of record, severely, in the amount of $2,880.00. Payment to be made to the Client Trust Fund of the Law Offices of Thomas W. J. Purtell within 30 days of notice of entry of order. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses By Defendants Wilton Marshall, An Individual, And Wilton Marshall, Trustee Of The Marshall Family Trust 2003 To Plaintiffs Judicial Council Form Interogatories, Set One; And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants And Their Attorney
Off Calendar Jan-26-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: (Court Call)
Martin Glickfeld, 415.441.7479 for Defendant Wilton Marshall.
Thomas Purtell, 414.722.6291 for Plaintiff Rebecca Dwyer.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF REBECCA DWYER Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses By Defendants Wilton Marshall, An Individual, And Wilton Marshall, Trustee Of The Marshall Family Trust 2003 To Plaintiffs Judicial Council Form Interogatories, Set One; And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants And Their Attorney is Denied. A motion to compel further responses to interrogatories requires the filing of a separate statement of items in dispute pursuant to CRC, Rule 3.1345. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
